content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Binder
description: Legendary Maliwan class mod for Maya the Siren, part of the Digistruct Peak content. Built around Suspension, Sweet Release, Wreck, Helios, Reaper. Boosts team cooldown rate alongside Maya skills.
notes: Requires Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge. The standard Binder is outclassed by this version but shares the same appearance.

special.description: Grants up to +31% team cooldown rate. Also boosts Maya skills, with rolls that can add up to +5 to Reaper, Helios, Suspension, Wreck, and Sweet Release.
special.title: Please hold.
